tweets.author: mariaurea.bsky.social
tweets.text: In 2025, American Bitcoin recorded losses, falling nearly 50% from its peak to around $60,000 in February. The company's share price dropped from $11 at its launch in September to approximately $4.20 by the end of November. By the end of April, the stock closed at $1.15. (R)
